name: Intrepid Metals Corp.
description: Intrepid Metals Corp. is a Canada-based exploration stage company focused on acquiring, exploring, and developing potential high-grade copper, silver, and gold projects in proximity to established mining districts in Arizona, USA. The company's principal properties include the Corral Copper Project, a high-grade advanced exploration property located in Cochise County, Arizona, and the Tombstone South Project, which is prospective for silver and lead-zinc mineralization.
